note: Dev/test checklist data for the in-app preview-legs panel (SNG-051). Solo legs run anytime; cross-player legs need GitHub sync configured on two profiles. Aevi owns this data file; CCode owns the panel that renders it.

legs.title: Cross-class cost
legs.do: Take or rank an ability outside your class.
legs.pass: Costs double — picker shows 2 pts, button reads ▲×2.

force.note: with a cross-class ability available to take

legs.title: Branch fork lock
legs.pass: Offers two paths, locks the unchosen one permanently, marks ⑂ on sheet + skill graph.

legs.title: Phase-3 feel-checks
legs.do: In a charged/tilted place do an aligned vs opposed action; try the surge dial; wake the Waystaff.
legs.pass: Aligned action gets a 'the place favored this' receipt; surge = power now + backlash after; Waystaff shows ✦.

legs.title: Per-character play-style
legs.do: Play Cellaceron on planned/strategic actions a few turns.
legs.pass: HE gains 'strategist'; Usnea's style doesn't move; old characters kept the style they had.

legs.title: Quest + inventory robustness
legs.do: Run a quest progress→complete and pick up/use a couple items.
legs.pass: Nothing silently vanishes; Quest Log matches; duplicate-named items stack instead of splitting.

legs.title: Gambit surfacing + XP
legs.do: Enter a multi-obstacle scene, then a plain 1-2 choice scene; run a gambit to completion.
legs.pass: Hint appears on the plan-apt scene, NOT the plain one; completion awards +10 XP. (If the hint feels too frequent, that's SNG-043, not a fail.)

legs.title: Narrative time
legs.do: Sleep, then have a short conversation.
legs.pass: Sleep jumps the clock ~8h; conversation ticks minutes; the story's time-of-day matches the clock.

legs.title: Generate anchor
legs.do: Walk somewhere the fiction hasn't authored.
legs.pass: A new in-grain place/person is minted, persists, is revisitable with facts intact, and reads like the LOCAL disposition — not generic.

force.note: move to an unauthored edge so the next step mints a place

legs.title: Rating ceiling
legs.do: Set your profile R+ then G and play the same beat; try to set a minor profile above PG.
legs.pass: Intensity differs by ceiling; a minor profile CANNOT be set above PG.

legs.title: One world, one clock
legs.do: With two characters at different personal day-counts, trigger an event/away-digest.
legs.pass: Both reference the SAME absolute world-date for the same event; each still shows its own journey-day.

force.manual: needs two characters at different personal day-counts

legs.title: Living advancement
legs.do: Leave an established grown entity across a real-time gap, then return.
legs.pass: It has moved on plausibly; the away-digest dates its deeds on the shared clock, on-or-before now.

force.note: dev-only time-jump; then return to see an established entity advanced

legs.title: Keep + nominate
legs.do: ⭐ Keep a grown entity; leave another ignored.
legs.pass: The kept one holds/climbs; the ignored one fades; some grown things surface as ★ Notable atop the Codex.

force.note: on a grown/established entity, to ⭐ Keep it

legs.title: Earned promotion
legs.do: Grow an entity to nominated tier on profile A (sync on).
legs.pass: It promotes into shared canon; a synced profile B receives it.

legs.title: Rating-lens
legs.do: Set profile B to a lower rating (e.g. G) and view an above-ceiling entity.
legs.pass: It comes through dialed-DOWN (softer wording), or ABSENT for sexual/gore — never softened-into-view.

legs.title: Contradiction → rank
legs.do: Force a promoted entity that collides with existing canon.
legs.pass: Resolves by realness-weight into a loud canonical truth + a persisting variant/rumor; authored core canon holds.

legs.title: Minor-protection floor
legs.do: View shared canon on a minor profile.
legs.pass: Gore/sexual content is HARD-EXCLUDED (absent), NOT softened. The family-safety floor — confirm directly.

legs.title: Character portrait
legs.do: Create a character (or hit a milestone) with imagery on.
legs.pass: A Pollinations portrait generates from your appearance/origin/gear, renders in-game, and PERSISTS (cached — doesn't regenerate on revisit); toggle off suppresses it.

force.note: new character or a level milestone with imagery on

legs.title: Location / moment art
legs.do: Discover a new place, or hit a big beat (discovery, gambit run).
legs.pass: An in-grain image appears for the place/moment and persists; stays within your rating ceiling.

force.note: discover a new place to trigger scene art

legs.title: Flirt stays in the scene
legs.do: At rating R, flirt with the NPC — type an attraction or flirtation line freely.
legs.pass: The GM engages: stays in the scene, no fade, no hedge, no safety/consent meta, and meets the R register. Auto-marks ✓ the instant the flirt is tagged `romantic` and the guidance doc loads; then eyeball the prose.

force.note: grants a test hero, sets the ceiling to R, and opens a scene with a romance-open NPC

forceVocabulary: intent-level setup hints for the SNG-051 'Run this scenario' button. CCode resolves each intent against content + existing primitives (travel/setRating/startEncounter/generate/clock-jump). Cross-player legs have no force (need two synced profiles → manual).
